{{Infobox character
| name = Arelius Underlord
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Arelius Underlord]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|worker}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] Arelius is a powerful and highly skilled [[Underlord]] belonging to the [[Arelius family]]. He possesses immense natural talent and has built a strong foundation of power, though his training style may appear unconventional. Known for his brash and overconfident personality, he often displays a sense of pride in his abilities. [[Eithan]] is characterized by his ability to perceive hidden weapons and overhear private plans, making him a difficult opponent to prepare against. He is capable of utilizing various techniques, including the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] and a [[veil]], and has been seen wearing turquoise-and-gold robes or battered armor. His combat prowess is demonstrated through the use of a spear and lightning-based abilities, such as three-colored sparks. Beyond his individual strength, he has demonstrated cunning by infiltrating the [[Ruins]] in disguise to secure a prize for himself and his followers.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Arelius Underlord]] approached the [[Ruins]] in disguise as a worker.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Arelius Underlord]] freed himself and his followers in the [[Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|An [[Arelius Underlord]] requested imperial assistance to establish authority over a city.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Arelius Underlord]] was standing near [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian]] is identified as an [[Arelius Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
